{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Ninecloud Court viewing tower
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Court viewing tower]] is a crystalline structure made of [[Forged madra]] and stained glass.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
